final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system mockup showcasing a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: UI design system sheet, classic minimal tech aesthetic, flat vector with subtle depth layers
Composition: multi-panel layout — web Dashboard panel (top, wide), mobile interface panel (mid-left), component grid (mid-right and bottom) showing cards / buttons / toggles / sliders / input fields / icons arranged in a structured spec sheet
Subject: web Dashboard with data charts, KPI cards, sidebar nav; mobile interface with status bar and content cards; component library — buttons (primary / secondary / ghost), toggle switches, checkboxes, radio buttons, input fields, progress bars, badges, icon set
Scene/backdrop: dark deep-space background (#0A0E1A range) with subtle grid lines and faint glow halos behind panels
Lighting/mood: cool blue-violet ambient glow, neon accent highlights on interactive elements, strong visual hierarchy with layered depth — foreground panels float above background
Color palette: deep navy / near-black base, electric blue (#00BFFF range) and cyan (#00FFD1 range) as primary accents, violet secondary accent, white text on dark surfaces, subtle glassmorphism tint on card surfaces
Materials/textures: frosted glass card surfaces with thin luminous borders, smooth flat buttons with glow states, hairline dividers, micro-shadow elevation layers
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all UI components must be clearly legible and recognizable; hierarchy must read from Dashboard → mobile → component detail; no lorem-ipsum blobs obscuring component shapes
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures, warm color palette, generic flat-design without depth, cluttered layout with no breathing room, watermarks
